surface.title: Landing
surface.headline: Turn a visit into a clear next action.
surface.lead: A landing-page demo for presenting one product promise, one audience and one conversion path while staying inside the selected Catalyst theme.

identity.title: Brand narrative
identity.body: Use this page to explain the implementation value without sending visitors into privileged.

modules.title: Focused sections
modules.body: The layout separates hero, proof, benefits and steps so developers can replace content safely.

security.title: Clean boundary
security.body: No setup data, privileged menus or internal module links are exposed inside the public landing experience.

capture.title: Capture attention
capture.body: Open with a strong promise and visible theme-consistent call to action.

configure.title: Explain value
configure.body: Use compact cards to describe the service, product or institutional offer.

deliver.title: Guide the user
deliver.body: Send the visitor to the store, registration or another public next step.

closing.title: Landing concept
closing.body: This is intentionally promotional: it is not a framework dashboard and it does not reveal privileged context.
